title: Intimacy coordination
blurb: Scenes involving physical intimacy must be handled with care, professionalism, and respect for everyone involved.
bullets: Preparatory conversations with producers, directors, and performers

testimonials.quote: I can recommend Signe Skovbye — she is deeply professional and a pleasure to work with.
[mock] Our actors showed up the next day without the usual dread around intimate scenes. It changed the whole set.
[mock] Signe prepared our director and performers without ever being in the way. A calm, clear voice in a space that's often confused.
[mock] She broke the choreography down like a dance sequence — everyone knew what they were doing before we rolled.
[mock] First time in my career an intimate scene didn't feel like a negotiation happening after the fact. Signe made the prep the actual work.
[mock] The cast debrief afterwards was what really surprised me. No one had to perform being okay.
